data.title: Trump's tariffs now shield US from bond market turmoil, global debt surpasses $97 trillion. U.S. debt at $30 trillion.
data.description: The recent global bond market turmoil has seen President Donald Trump's controversial tariffs play a surprising role in the U.S.'s financial stability. Initially a concern, these tariffs are now viewed as essential for Washington's economic well-being. This shift in perception has helped the U.S. navigate the recent government bond market sell-off more successfully. Global government debt has surpassed $97 trillion, double its 2010 level, primarily driven by pandemic-related spending and recovery efforts in countries like the U.K., France, and Japan. The increase in government debt is outpacing corporate and household borrowing, according to the Institute of International Finance. Despite reaching a record $30 trillion in public debt, investors are still optimistic about U.S. treasuries. This positive outlook is reflected in the continued demand for long-term bonds from developed economies with higher yields.

data.title: Autel Energy launches advanced EV charging platform at global event in Berlin to meet demand for fast, reliable infrastructure.
data.description: Recently, Autel Energy Europe unveiled its latest EV charging platform during the "INFINITE POWER – STARTING FROM ZERO" Global Launch Event in Berlin. This cutting-edge solution aims to address the increasing need for rapid, dependable, and expandable charging systems in Europe and globally. By utilizing proprietary liquid-cooled power modules, the platform delivers exceptional performance and versatility, allowing operators to customize and expand their charging infrastructure seamlessly.

data.title: ALGO price aiming for $0.34 resistance, 48% upside by Oct 2025. Bullish momentum, key support at $0.22 intact.
data.description: The forecast for ALGO predicts a target of $0.34 as a resistance level, with the current momentum being bullish. Analysts suggest a potential 48% increase based on the Algorand forecast. The key support level remains strong at $0.22, signaling a positive outlook for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Seven Seoul brands showcasing sustainability and innovation to Paris at Maison&Objet Paris 2025 by Seoul Design Foundation.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, the Seoul Design Foundation is set to showcase seven brands at Maison&Objet Paris 2025. These brands will highlight a fusion of Korean craftsmanship, technology, and urban creativity.
